title: dysoxylum loureiroi
intro: Dysoxylum loureiroi, also known as the Chinese dogwood or Loureiro's Dysoxylum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Meliaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Dysoxylum loureiroi include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with fever, cough, and sore throat, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and promote cardiovascular health. Dysoxylum loureiroi is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
